abilities.name: oblivious
abilities.shortEffect: Prevents infatuation and protects against Captivate.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon cannot be infatuated and is immune to Captivate. If a Pokémon is infatuated and acquires this ability, its infatuation is cleared.
abilities.flavorText: The Pokémon is oblivious, keeping it from being infatuated, falling for taunts, or being affected by Intimidate.

abilities.name: forewarn
abilities.shortEffect: Reveals the opponents' strongest move upon entering battle.
abilities.effect: When this Pokémon enters battle, it reveals the move with the highest base power known by any opposing Pokémon to all participating trainers. In the event of a tie, one is chosen at random. Moves without a listed base power are assigned one as follows: Power | Moves ----: | ----- 160 | One-hit KO moves: Fissure, Guillotine, Horn Drill, and Sheer Cold 120 | Counter moves: Counter, Metal Burst, and Mirror Coat 80 | Variable power or set damage: Crush Grip, Dragon Rage, Electro Ball, Endeavor, Final Gambit, Flail, Frustration, Grass Knot, Gyro Ball, Heat Crash, Heavy Slam, Hidden Power, Low Kick, Natural Gift, Night Shade, Psywave, Return, Reversal, Seismic Toss, Sonic Boom, Trump Card, and Wring Out 0 | Any such move not listed
abilities.flavorText: When it enters a battle, the Pokémon can tell one of the moves an opposing Pokémon has.

abilities.name: hydration
abilities.shortEffect: Cures any major status ailment after each turn during rain.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon is cured of any major status ailment after each turn during rain.
abilities.flavorText: Cures the Pokémon's status conditions in rain.
